message.content:
다음 작업을 수행해주세요.

1. 먼저 `gh auth switch --user ryudae33` 실행
2. 경로: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_JX1`
3. git status, git diff 확인
4. 변경된 파일 스테이징 후 커밋:
   - S150 V2/FrmMain.vb: TYPE4 컬럼 기반 HEV 프린터 출력 추가
   - S150 V2/S150 - 192.168.0.225 V2.vbproj: SharedClass 경로 수정
   - 커밋 메시지: "feat(S150): TYPE4=HEV일 때 프린터에 PE 대신 HEV 출력"
5. git push origin master (또는 현재 브랜치)

주의: git은 C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_JX1 디렉토리 기준

content.content: ✓ Switched active account for github.com to ryudae33

On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.

Changes not staged for commit:
  (use "git add <file>..." to update what will be committed)
  (use "git restore <file>..." to discard changes in working directory)
	modified:   S150 V2/FrmMain.vb
	modified:   S150 V2/S150 - 192.168.0.225 V2.vbproj
	modified:   S80/FrmPort.Designer.vb
	modified:   S80/FrmPort.vb
	modified:   S80/Module1.vb

no changes added to commit (use "git add" and/or "git commit -a")

diff --git a/S150 V2/FrmMain.vb b/S150 V2/FrmMain.vb
index 2be3382..d6fa68d 100644
--- a/S150 V2/FrmMain.vb	
+++ b/S150 V2/FrmMain.vb	
@@ -16,6 +16,7 @@ Imports System.Reflection
 Public Class FrmMain
     Private FlagSendFoldingSignal As Boolean
     Private OptionCarType As String
+    Private OptionType4 As String
     Private Player As New SoundPlayer
 
     Public FLagEcuCHECK As Boolean
@@ -1098,6 +1099,8 @@ Public Class FrmMain
             OP_HANESS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP_HANESS").Value)
             OP_SLIDE = Trim(Rs.Fields("PWR_SLIDE").Value)
 
+            OptionType4 = Trim(CStr(If(IsDBNull(Rs.Fields("TYPE4").Value), "", Rs.Fields("TYPE4").Value)))
+
             OP_ECU = Trim(Rs.Fields("Op_ECU").Value)
 
             OP_BUCKLE_ENERGIZATION = Trim(Rs.Fields("W_BUCKLE").Value)
@@ -2140,7 +2143,7 @@ ErrHandler:
                 wStep = 3.21
             End If
 
-        ElseIf wstep = 3.21 Then
+        ElseIf wStep = 3.21 Then
 
             TimerCOunt = TimerCOunt + 0.1
             If TimerCOunt >= 2 Then wStep = 3.5
@@ -2820,7 +2823,7 @@ ErrHandler:
         End If
 
         If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
-            tmpinr = Trim(Rs.Fields("INJECT").Value)
+            TmpINR = Trim(Rs.Fields("INJECT").Value)
             tmpOTR = Trim(Rs.Fields("INJECT2").Value)
         ElseIf Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
             Rs.MoveFirst()
@@ -2866,7 +2869,8 @@ ErrHandler:
                 Serial_Printer.Write("^FO340,180^A0N,34,30^FD" & "FWD:" & S110_SLIDE_FWD.ToString & " " & "BWD:" & S110_SLIDE_BWD.ToString & " " & "LENGTH:" & S120_LENGTH.ToString & "      DSC" & "^ FS")
 
                 If OptionCarType = "PE" Then
-                    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO700,120^A0N,160,220^FD" & "PE" & "^FS")
+                    Dim printCarType As String = If(OptionType4 = "HEV", "HEV", "PE")
+                    Serial_Printer.Write("^FO700,120^A0N,160,220^FD" & printCarType & "^FS")
                 End If
 
             Else

diff --git a/S80/Module1.vb b/S80/Module1.vb
index 1524a6b..962d5a4 100644
--- a/S80/Module1.vb
+++ b/S80/Module1.vb
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
     Public FWD_TIME As Double
 
     Public OPTION_SENSOR_ON As Boolean
+    Public OPTION_HEATER_ON As Boolean
 
     Public RECL_FWD_TIME As Double
     Public RECL_BWD_TIME As Double
@@ -149,6 +150,11 @@
             Password = CStr(Rs.Fields("PASSWORD").Value)
             OPTION_SENSOR_ON = Rs.Fields("OPTION_SENSOR_ON").Value
             FWD_TIME = CDbl(Rs.Fields("FWD_TIME").Value)
+            Try
+                OPTION_HEATER_ON = Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER_ON").Value
+            Catch
+                OPTION_HEATER_ON = True
+            End Try
         End If
 
         Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
@@ -177,6 +183,10 @@
             Rs.Fields("TOOL1").Value = PortNumber_TOOL1
             Rs.Fields("OPTION_SENSOR_ON").Value = OPTION_SENSOR_ON
             Rs.Fields("FWD_TIME").Value = CStr(FWD_TIME)
+            Try
+                Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER_ON").Value = OPTION_HEATER_ON
+            Catch
+            End Try
             Rs.Update()
 
         End If
